calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Elizabeth Roemer Harrington, Petitioner.
Sean P. Harrington, Husband to Petitioner.

The Court reviewed the documentation submitted in support of the petition, including photographic evidence, but noted that the scanned attachments were unclear. Mrs. Harrington provided original photographs and additional records at the hearing, which the Court reviewed and found sufficient.

The parties explained that they sought to establish their marriage as legally recognized due to issues obtaining a certified marriage record for retirement benefits. They described previously attempting to retrieve a marriage license, only to discover that no record of its processing existed.

The Court granted the petition, finding that the evidence sufficiently established that Sean P. Harrington and Elizabeth Roemer Harrington were lawfully married on October 19, 1991, in San Francisco. The order granting the petition was signed in open court.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
